For Judgment On The Pleadings Or In The Alternative To Strike Plaintiffs Complaint And Mtn For Imposition Of Sanctions; Decl Of Jeffrey Rabkin
Off Calendar Apr-02-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. Tentative ruling adopted as follows:
Defendant City and County of San Francisco's Motion for Judgment On The Pleadings Or In The Alternative To Strike Plaintiffs Complaint And motion For Imposition Of Sanctions: Motion for judgment on the pleadings is GRANTED with ten days to file an amended complaint which separately pleads numbers and identifies plaintiff's distinct causes of action in compliance with CRC 312(g) Request for sanctions Denied. (JJM/MD) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
